LanguageData.WestTek_ForcedEvolution.description: A wandering band of super mutants has broken from the chaos of the wasteland, bringing with them a cache of refined FEV doses, and just enough salvaged knowledge to attempt recreating the transformation process.
LanguageData.WestTek_ForcedEvolution.label: Forced Evolution
LanguageData.WestTek_ForcedEvolution.scenario.summary: One first-generation super mutant, two second-generation super mutants, and some FEV.
LanguageData.Sanguophage.description: The old stories called creatures like you Wendigos: starving things that outlived the people they once were. However it happened, you carry that curse now. Hunted, half-feral, and never truly full, you fled into the wastes before the wrong people could pin you down. Note: Wendigos have unique strengths and brutal weaknesses, making this a difficult scenario.
LanguageData.Sanguophage.label: the wendigo
LanguageData.Sanguophage.scenario.summary: One hunted Wendigo, one human companion, and a hunger that never sleeps.
LanguageData.Sanguophage.scenario.parts.GameStartDial: The old tales were supposed to be superstition until you became one of them. You are a Wendigo now - hard to kill, harder to trust, and always hungry. When the hunters closed in, you fled aboard the first failing craft that would lift off. It did not stay in the air for long. Now you wake in the wreckage with one companion, a cold knot of hunger in your gut, and the wasteland deciding what kind of monster you will be.
